hero.title: Nitaq Platform
hero.subtitle: We connect businesses and individuals with Saudi Arabia's top service providers — competitive pricing, full transparency, and secure escrow on every job.

features.title: Why Nitaq?
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your service requests safely and efficiently

marketplace.title: Open Bidding Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Publish your request and invite dozens of verified service providers to bid competitively in minutes.

direct.title: Direct Provider Request
direct.desc: Have a preferred provider? Send them the request directly — they accept or propose a different price.

tracking.title: Live Progress Tracking
tracking.desc: Track your service request from assignment to completion in real time.

escrow.title: Secure Escrow Payments
escrow.desc: Your money is held in escrow and only released to the provider after job confirmation.

verified.title: Verified Providers Only
verified.desc: Every provider undergoes KYC verification: commercial registration, insurance, and valid credentials.

ratings.title: Transparent Rating System
ratings.desc: Rate providers after every job, and view others' ratings before choosing your bid.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps from request to completion
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe your service need and requirements in a few simple steps.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Verified providers submit their bids — compare price, rating, and timeline.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Funds held in Escrow until job completion. No surprises, no hidden fees.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Monitor progress in real time. Once completed, funds are released automatically.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses using Nitaq every day

footer.tagline: The smart services marketplace in Saudi Arabia — connecting businesses and individuals with top service providers with full transparency.

about.title: About Nitaq
about.subtitle: Redefining the service marketplace in Saudi Arabia
about.missionBody: We aim to unify the B2B services market into one transparent platform, where clients find the best prices and providers in minutes, and service providers find real, sustained demand to grow their business.
about.visionBody: To be the #1 services marketplace in the Middle East, serving thousands of businesses daily through an expansive network of verified service providers.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Our team is ready to answer your questions and help with anything related to the platform
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject (Optional)
contact.sentBody: We'll get back to you soon on your registered email.
